name: Unsplash
description: Search and browse millions of high-resolution free photos from the Unsplash community. Great for content creation workflows.

auth.hint: Register an app at unsplash.com/oauth/applications. In the API Key field enter: Client-ID YOUR_ACCESS_KEY (include "Client-ID " prefix).

tools.name: search_photos
tools.description: Search Unsplash for photos matching a keyword.

params.name: query
params.description: Search keywords, e.g. "mountain sunset" or "office workspace"

params.name: color
params.description: Filter by color: black_and_white, black, white, yellow, orange, red, purple, blue, green, teal

tools.name: get_random_photo
tools.description: Get one or more random photos, optionally filtered by topic or search term.

params.name: query
params.description: Optional search term to filter random photos

tools.name: get_photo
tools.description: Get full details for a photo including EXIF data, location, and download URL.
